parents.subject: LU-7912 osc: Remove stale comment in osc_page_transfer_add

commit.subject: LU-11089 libcfs: clear_and_wake_up_bit() is not used
commit.message:
LU-11089 libcfs: clear_and_wake_up_bit() is not used

The clear_and_wake_up_bit() check and compatibility macro was added
to libcfs, but it doesn't appear to be used by anything in Lustre.
Remove it and the corresponding configure check.

Fixes: 372ef85512dd ("LU-11089 obd: use wait_event_var() ...")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0c43b2b7477489a6413e61ff56ac7e225b3ebbe5
